invariants.claim: Dual-seal semantics live outside NovaSeal core.
Every signed dual-seal intent commits to NovaSealCanonicalEnvelopeV0.
Finalisation binds the sealed UTXO commitment and BTC closure commitment hash.
Finalisation is rejected before the CKB maturity timepoint.
Finalisation requires both BTC owner and CKB authority signatures.

invariants.claim: Finalisation consumes the active dual-seal Cell and materialises a terminal receipt only.
invariants.location: consume old_cell and create final_receipt statements

invariants.claim: Finalisation increments nonce exactly once and rejects u64 overflow.
A live devnet dual-seal finality path exists before local V1 readiness.
Public BTC closure verification remains external to this package.
